articles.title: Shark Dentist Official Gameplay Trailer - IGN Live 2026
articles.description: Get a new look at Shark Dentist in this terrifying new trailer for the upcoming horror roguelike game where you play as a shark dentist. The new trailer showcases gameplay and the expansion of the game world, including advanced dental tools, dental care methods, a new location, and an unexpected, gruesome death. Shark Dentist will be available on PC.Your task is to treat the teeth of giant predators in a dark clinic while avoiding their deadly aggression in Shark Dentist. Balance tactics, luck, and limited resources to heal your patient without losing your own life.

articles.title: Dungeon Gambler Official Announcement Trailer - IGN Live 2026
articles.description: Pay what you owe. Survive the dungeon. Defeat the Skeleton. Enjoy your stay. Here's your look at the Dungeon Gambler: All In / No Out announcement trailer for this upcoming puzzle adventure, turn-based dungeon crawler RPG with visual novel elements and gambling madness, set in an 80s retro-fantasy world. Dungeon Gambler: All In / No Out will be available on PC.

articles.title: Realm of Ink - Official Launch Trailer
articles.description: Realm of Ink is available now, with version 1.0 available on PC, alongside its launch on PlayStation, Xbox, and Nintendo Switch. Watch the Realm of Ink launch trailer for this ink-style action Roguelite game. While pursuing the Fox Demon, the swordswoman Red, unexpectedly finds that her life is dictated by the 'destiny' within the world of the book. Only by breaking free can she unveil the truth of her existence and challenge the constraints of fate.

articles.title: Halloween: The Game - Official Single-Player Trailer
articles.description: Prepare to unleash hell upon the residents of Haddonfield as the indomitable Michael Myers. Watch the latest Halloween: The Game trailer for this upcoming asymmetrical horror multiplayer game developed by Illfonic, and take a look at the single-player experience. On Halloween night, 1978, no one is safe from Michael Myers. Become the Boogeyman or fight back against the face of evil itself in Halloween. Halloween: The Game will be available on PlayStation 5 (PS5), Xbox Series X|S, and PC (Steam) on September 8, 2026.

articles.title: Warhammer 40,000: Rogue Trader - The Infinite Museion Official Gameplay Trailer - IGN Live 2026
articles.description: Check out gameplay from Warhammer 40,000: Rogue Trader - The Infinite Museion in this latest trailer for the upcoming DLC for the RPG. The Infinite Museion is the third story expansion for Warhammer 40,000: Rogue Trader, drawing you into the iconic vault of Trazyn the Infinite. Pursue rare artefacts, enhance yourself with augmentations, and choose whether to serve the designs of one of the galaxy’s most infamous collectors or oppose him. Warhammer 40,000: Rogue Trader - The Infinite Museion will be available on Steam, GOG, Epic Games Store, PlayStation 5 (PS5), and Xbox Series X/S on June 11, 2026.

articles.title: Aniimo - Official Gameplay Trailer - IGN Live 2026
articles.description: Take another look at Aniimo in this trailer for the upcoming free-to-play, next-gen creature-catching open-world RPG. Explore the vast continent of Idyll, Twine with unique Aniimo, unlock new abilities. Travel to a sky-floating metropolis, meet other Pathfinders, and battle in exciting competitions. Choose your Aniimo and begin your epic journey! Aniimo will be available on PC, mobile, and Xbox Series X/S.

articles.title: No Law Official 'Crafting Port Desire' Dev Diary Video - IGN Live 2026
articles.description: Join the development team for a behind-the-scenes look at No Law in this latest video for the upcoming FPS game. Watch as the developers discuss the creation of Port Desire, the dense cybergrunge city you'll explore in No Law. In this new video, get a close look at the cluttered markets, lived-in apartments, and neon-soaked streets, and see how dynamic lighting, crowds, and systemic destruction come together to make a world that reacts and changes around your actions. In No Law, welcome to Port Desire, a city that doesn't belong to anyone, but where everyone wants a piece. You’re Grey Harker, an ex-military attempting to live a quiet life after near fatal injuries in the field. All you want now is peace - but in a city of no laws, what you want isn’t always what you get.No Law will be available on PC.

articles.title: Former OpenAI CTO Mira Murati Shares Stark Warning About AI's Future, Says It's More Like A 'Tandem Bike' Than Autopilot
articles.description: Mira Murati , co-founder and CEO of Thinking Machines Lab , said frontier AI must function like a “tandem bike,” with both humans and machines collaborating throughout development. Speaking at Bloomberg Tech 2026 in San Francisco on Friday, the former OpenAI CTO pushed back on the idea that “humans in the loop” is sufficient framing for safe AI development. “It sounds like a checkpoint where we’re signing off something and then you’re good to go,” she said. “Both people are pedaling, but when you’re going up a hill, whoever is stronger is pedaling harder — but both hands are on the wheel,” Murati said. “That’s a system designed for collaboration.” Not A Predestined Outcome Murati said AI’s future is “not a predestined outcome,” dismissing predictions of either dystopia or utopia as oversimplified. She called for institutional checks and balances over individual authority, saying governance ... Full story available on Benzinga.com

Knife-edged camper slices out of the wind tunnel & into the bush
articles.description: Polydrops once noted it went through more than 100 CFD simulations to finalize the thin, tapered form of its wing-like P21 family camping trailer. But apparently, it wasn't finished. Because as it ruggedized the P21 into off-road form, it also further massaged the vessel's already slippery aerodynamic profile. So whether you're worried about draining the battery of your Rivian R2 or sipping up every last drop of gas during a far-flung backcountry tour, the P21X helps ensure that doesn't happen ... and then it sleeps you and the family comfortably. Continue Reading Category: Camping Trailers , Adventure Vehicles , Outdoors Tags: Caravan , polydrops , trailers , Trailer , RV , Off-road , Off-grid , Aerodynamic , Camping , Outdoors and Camping

articles.title: NASA just proved spacecraft can switch between multiple satellite networks
articles.description: NASA’s PExT terminal has shown that spacecraft can seamlessly communicate through multiple government and commercial networks, a major step beyond traditional single-network systems. The mission is now expanding to test new capabilities that could help create a more flexible, reliable communications infrastructure for future space missions.

articles.title: Brace yourself, Mr Bond: 007 First Light is getting some pirate king DLC alongside New Game+ and extra TacSim challenges
articles.description: Io Interactive's Hitmanly Bond adventure 007 First Light is getting some DLC, and the DLC involves PIRATES. Specifically, it involves pirate king Bawma, played by singer and actor Lenny Kravitz, who makes a fleeting appearance in the main game. In the upcoming DLC, players will travel to the pirate haven of Aleph to help Bawma out with a mysterious request. What does it involve? Io aren't saying, just yet, but they have published a roadmap for the game's first year of updates. I've hitherto expressed violent objections to the unromantic term "roadmap" in game marketing, but I will let it slide here, because James Bond drives a lot of cars, and presumably consults a map now and then when he isn't dodging bullets. Anyway, let's dig in. Read more
